Incident Report (UK) — Northcrown Capital plc — Cyber/ESG operational incident affecting crypto custody pilot and pre-disclosure materials.
Prepared by: Ms. Evelyn Hart, Head of Compliance, e.hart@northcrowncap.co.uk; reviewed by Mr. Oliver Bain, CISO.
On 05/06/2026 at 21:40 BST, an external IP exploited a misconfigured service account on our testnet node for the GreenFlow token pilot, exposing a draft ESG-linked bond term sheet and internal emissions datasets.
The term sheet (non-public) includes proposed coupon of 6.15% with a 25 bps step-down on verified Scope 1–2 reductions, and a carbon-credit floor price of £38 per tCO2e in a three-year offtake with Kestrel Renewables Ltd.
This information is likely to be precise and price-sensitive; it is being treated as potential inside information under UK MAR, and the insider list must be updated immediately.
A misrouted service desk ticket briefly bypassed the information barrier, making the GreenFlow go-live schedule and coupon mechanics visible to two Sales chat channels for approximately 14 minutes.
We are within a closed period ahead of our half-year results (blackout window commences 01/08/2026); trading by PDMRs and closely associated persons remains prohibited.
Market sounding/wall-crossing records show Albermarq Capital and Ridgebank Partners were approached last week under NDAs; both counterparties acknowledged confidentiality and non-reliance letters.
Possible selective disclosure risk: a contractor at NettleForge IT was told that coupon resets are tied to solar capacity KPIs; staff are reminded not to tip or discuss deal terms outside cleared channels.
Personal data impacted: names and work emails of 17 employees (e.g., Mr. Jae Park, j.park@northcrowncap.co.uk) were accessed; no payroll, NI, or bank details were involved.
Containment: disabled compromised credentials, rotated multisig keys on the custody module, segmented the ESG-Tokenisation workspace, and initiated forensic log preservation; no customer wallets were affected.
We are preparing a holding announcement for release via a recognised UK regulatory news service if materiality is confirmed; draft language is with Legal for review.
The onboarding training on insider lists, market soundings, and crypto custody segregation is educational only and does not contain inside information or commercial terms.
Our ESG dashboard marketing page referencing climate metrics and token architecture is for general audiences and uses only previously published information.
For queries or to report any further contact with external parties, email compliance@northcrowncap.co.uk or call the incident line on +44 20 3555 0147; escalation point: Dr. Saira Qureshi, CFO.
